summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Collective WordPress theme. All 10 requested features verified and working correctly. UI is polished with proper animations, responsive design, and clean typography.

features_tested.notes: 728x90 ad placeholder visible on all pages, scales on mobile
CSS aspect-ratio: 5/3 confirmed, not full browser width
6 related articles displayed in 3-column grid below author bio

features_tested.feature: SVG separator (three dots) between infinite scroll articles
features_tested.notes: Custom SVG with three dots visible between articles during infinite scroll
Logo supports both text and image formats with proper styling
Dark #0d0d0d background, 3-column layout with categories and social counts
Image + title + author in horizontal rows
Avatar, name, bio, social icons all centered
IntersectionObserver triggers loading of next article from same category
fadeInUp on post cards, scale transform on images, button transitions

additional_tests.notes: Opens with fade animation, search input works
Article → Category → Author → Home all working

critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Frontend uses MOCKED data from /app/frontend/src/data/posts.js - no real backend API
SVG separator is a clean three-dots design in page-separator.svg
Animations are well implemented with reduced-motion media query support

mocked_data.mocked_content: 8 sample posts, 2 authors, 4 categories - hardcoded data

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. Frontend uses mock data from posts.js. No backend API integration needed for this WordPress theme preview. Key test pages: /, /article/{slug}, /category/{slug}, /author/{slug}
